landing.heroTitle: Find your working rhythm in one pass
landing.heroBody: Available tests and engineering blog notes live in a single catalog. Expand a card, choose an action, and move forward with one deterministic handoff.

test.resultBody: Result is computed from your final answers, including any updated Q1 choice.
test.instructionBody: Read each question and choose one answer. You can revisit and revise earlier answers before final submit.
test.blockedTitle: This test is unavailable with your current consent choice
test.blockedBody: This test requires opt-in consent before it can start. You can return to landing or choose an opt-out test instead.
test.blockedSuggestionsTitle: Tests you can start without opting in

history.title: Local Result History
history.body: Each completed run is stored as an independent entry (newest first, max 50).

consent.message: We use cookies and similar technologies to help the service work properly and to understand how it is used. You can choose whether to allow optional cookies, and you can change your choice at any time.
consent.gateMessage: Accept all to continue into this test. If you disagree, this test will stay blocked and we will suggest opt-out tests instead.
consent.gateConfirmMessage: If you disagree, this test cannot start. Do you want to keep the test blocked and save that choice now?
